what_changes_our_mind: 2026 H1 报告 discloses overseas segment GM < 17% (collapsing the +280bps premium toward zero) OR consolidated GM < 16% — either would invalidate the mix-shift accretion mechanism.
_methodology_note: MVP scaffold: this record carries the wrongIf/rightIf as PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW. KR3 (Junyan 2026-05-15): conditions are MECHANIZED at generation so they are judgeable at the named disclosure event. When the catalyst occurs (e.g., 2026-08-28 BYD H1 print) a human (Junyan) or future NLP/data pass marks each condition as one of: TRIGGERED | NOT_TRIGGERED | INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE | INCONCLUSIVE, with evidence. INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE (issuer did not disclose the metric) is tracked separately from INCONCLUSIVE (disclosed but ambiguous) and from a clean TRIGGERED/NOT_TRIGGERED — the split is itself a calibration signal on how falsifiable our conditions actually were. Once all conditions resolved, set verified_final_outcome to compute hit rate into outcomes_summary.
